PUBLIC RELATIONS ROADMAP

PUBLIC RELATIONS students need practical, industry-relevant skills that connect classroom knowledge to internships, projects, professional practice, and global career opportunities.

MEDIA RELATIONS

MEDIA RELATIONS is a practical skill that helps PUBLIC RELATIONS students prepare for real professional work.

CRISIS COMMUNICATION

CRISIS COMMUNICATION is a practical skill that helps PUBLIC RELATIONS students prepare for real professional work.

PRESS RELEASE WRITING

PRESS RELEASE WRITING is a practical skill that helps PUBLIC RELATIONS students prepare for real professional work.

EVENT COMMUNICATION

EVENT COMMUNICATION is a practical skill that helps PUBLIC RELATIONS students prepare for real professional work.

STAKEHOLDER ENGAGEMENT

STAKEHOLDER ENGAGEMENT is a practical skill that helps PUBLIC RELATIONS students prepare for real professional work.

BRAND COMMUNICATION

BRAND COMMUNICATION is a practical skill that helps PUBLIC RELATIONS students prepare for real professional work.

SOCIAL MEDIA MANAGEMENT

SOCIAL MEDIA MANAGEMENT is a practical skill that helps PUBLIC RELATIONS students prepare for real professional work.

PUBLIC SPEAKING

PUBLIC SPEAKING is a practical skill that helps PUBLIC RELATIONS students prepare for real professional work.

COMMUNICATION STRATEGY

COMMUNICATION STRATEGY is a practical skill that helps PUBLIC RELATIONS students prepare for real professional work.

REPUTATION MANAGEMENT

REPUTATION MANAGEMENT is a practical skill that helps PUBLIC RELATIONS students prepare for real professional work.

WHY THESE SKILLS MATTER

PROFESSIONAL READINESS

These skills help students move from theory to practical work.

EMPLOYER DEMAND

Employers value graduates who can use tools, solve problems, and communicate results.

CAREER GROWTH

Building these skills early creates stronger opportunities for internships, projects, and jobs.
